defect_1_missing_file_unreachable.how: expected admitted-name set built from remote manifest before local inspection; every expected name required present; missing name reported, never dropped

defect_2_self_referential_checksums.how: expected checksums bound from remote immutable metadata (lfs/blob sha256) and reconciled against locally computed sha256; missing immutable identity fails closed

defect_3_storage_resume_absent_from_conj.how: free-space/expected-bytes/temp-overhead/safety-margin/partial-cleanup/deterministic-resume/final-reconciliation/cache-isolation conjunction; gpu ceilings excluded as non-storage evidence

defect_6_tests_not_exercising_orchestrat.how: run_staging_orchestration composes remote-manifest->download->discover->presence->checksum->storage; integration tests force missing/partial/extra/cache/wrong-checksum/insufficient-space/cleanup/resume/mutable-revision/path-escape through that same path

remaining_blockers.defect_4_source_and_load_manifest_admiss: pinned model-implementation-source proofs (text-only Qwen3_5MoeForCausalLM class/source mapping, shared-expert construction, Gated DeltaNet projections, final RMS norm, untied 248320 head, vision/MTP omission from admitted load manifest) not yet bound; configuration metadata alone is insufficient
remaining_blockers.defect_5_complete_tokenizer_conjunction: tokenizer verdict not yet bound to tokenizer-file manifest identity, normalization/cleanup settings, admitted special-token behavior, chat-template identity, and exact model/tokenizer revision pairing
remaining_blockers.live_cli_wiring: run_staging_orchestration not yet wired into the live HfApi/snapshot_download CLI entrypoint with a fresh end-to-end rerun binding real remote LFS identities
remaining_blockers.weight_staging: not attempted; not authorized before a genuine Phase-0 pass
